text:
On Tue, Oct 14, 2008 at 2:43 PM, Stefan Walter <sw@gegenunendlich.de> wrote:
> Hi Emiel,
>
> the port audio/musicpd has been updated in the meantime. Can you still
> reproduce the problem you reported with the new version?

chance to test.

Regards,

 - Emiel van de Laar
